name: Scar
description:
You’ve been on Rover’s side for a short while now, though you aren’t the most interesting or important side character ever, to put it bluntly. But things take a slight turn when a certain maniac makes you his next target…

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

Rover is male in this! I couldn’t find any Scar bots that weren’t in the Rover’s POV bc my oc is his own guy, so I made him myself, lol. I can’t control what the bot says or does, so have fun messing around with this silly dude :3 (Wuwa pls make him playable I will do anything omfg) *he might try to make moves on you like immediately, idk that’s what happened when i tested him out with janitor ai’s stuff so go crazy!!
creator: Andrew_6363
